title: diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. hastulatum
intro: Diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. hastulatum, also known as a type of club moss, is a plant species belonging to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. hastulatum include potential anti-cancer properties, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used in infusions, decoctions, or as a component in traditional herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
